sections.heading: Custom Software Development
paragraphs: We develop [custom software solutions](/services/custom-software-development) tailored to specific business requirements.

Projects can include internal tools, customer-facing applications, reporting platforms, management dashboards, workflow systems, or specialist software designed to solve real business problems and remain easy to maintain.

sections.heading: Who We Work With
paragraphs: The studio is well suited to small businesses, startups, independent professionals, and organisations looking for focused software development support.
Projects can be shaped around specific requirements, budgets, and timelines without the overhead often associated with larger development agencies.

sections.heading: Software Consultancy & Solution Design
paragraphs: Successful software projects start with clear requirements, well-understood problems, and the right technical approach.
Support can include solution design, technical planning, application architecture, workflow reviews, prototype planning, and early-stage project discovery.
This helps confirm ideas early, reduce costly changes later, and keep projects focused on solving the right problems.

sections.heading: Mobile App Development
paragraphs: [Native iPhone and iPad applications](/services/mobile-app-development) can be designed and developed from concept through to App Store release.
Experience includes cloud-connected services, analytics, localisation, achievements, leaderboards, subscriptions, in-app purchases, shared progression systems, and long-term product support.
Projects can range from simple utility apps to feature-rich consumer products.

sections.heading: Prototypes & Proof of Concepts
paragraphs: Not every idea requires a full product build immediately.

[Rapid prototypes and proof-of-concept applications](/services/prototypes-proof-of-concepts) help validate ideas, demonstrate functionality, gather feedback, and reduce risk before committing to larger investments.
These early-stage builds are ideal for startups, internal innovation projects, and organisations exploring new opportunities.

sections.heading: Business Process Improvement
paragraphs: Many organisations still rely on spreadsheets, emails, manual processes, or disconnected systems to manage important workflows.

We can help identify opportunities to simplify operations, improve reporting, reduce repetitive tasks, and create software that supports [business process improvement](/services/business-process-improvement).
The aim is to improve efficiency while keeping solutions practical, reliable, and easy to use.

sections.heading: Internal Business Tools
paragraphs: [Custom business tools](/services/internal-business-tools) can help teams work more effectively and reduce administrative overhead.
Examples include reporting dashboards, workflow tracking systems, approval processes, operational management tools, administration portals, customer databases, and lightweight automation platforms.
Solutions are designed around the way teams actually work rather than forcing processes into generic software.

sections.heading: Websites & Content Platforms
paragraphs: We can develop lightweight [websites and content-driven platforms](/services/websites-content-platforms), JSON-powered systems, and custom web applications.
Projects focus on performance, maintainability, search engine visibility, content management, and long-term flexibility.

sections.heading: Technical Experience
paragraphs: Experience includes software development, application architecture, mobile applications, cloud-hosted systems, workflow automation, websites, data-driven platforms, localisation, analytics, and digital transformation projects.
Additional expertise includes security-aware design, compliance considerations, API integration, reporting systems, operational tooling, and cloud technologies.
This broad technical background enables ideas to move quickly from concept to working software.

sections.heading: Proven Development Experience
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios actively develops and maintains a portfolio of public mobile applications and games alongside custom software projects.
These products demonstrate practical experience across application design, user experience, cloud services, analytics, localisation, deployment, monetisation, and ongoing support.

sections.heading: Why Work With BarkinMad Studios?
paragraphs: As an independent studio, BarkinMad Studios provides direct communication, practical decision making, and a clear focus on delivering value.
The aim is to build software that solves real problems, improves workflows, and remains useful long after the initial release.

sections.heading: Discuss a Project
paragraphs: Have an app idea, business challenge, prototype requirement, workflow problem, or software project in mind?
Get in touch to discuss how the studio can help.
